name: @omadia/llm-adapter-anthropic
description: Anthropic Messages wire-format adapter for the omadia LLM provider seam. Implements the @omadia/llm-provider-api LlmAdapter contract (wireFormat 'anthropic') and confines all @anthropic-ai/sdk knowledge here. Register it into an LlmAdapterRegistry at boot via registerAnthropicAdapter. See docs/plans/issue-298-provider-plugins.md.
